title: Palo Alto Firewall Log Generator
description: Generates sample Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS traffic log entries in CSV syslog format. Produces a realistic mix of ALLOW and DENY/DROP/RESET actions across multiple source/destination pairs, ports, and applications so that downstream analytics can validate whether traffic is being blocked by the firewall. Approximately 60% of generated entries are allowed and 40% are blocked to simulate a realistic partial-block scenario.

generate_palo_alto_logs.name: generate_palo_alto_logs
generate_palo_alto_logs.description: Runs a JavaScript action that builds sample Palo Alto PAN-OS 10.x traffic log lines in standard CSV syslog format and returns them as both a single multi-line string and a structured array.

ingest_logs_to_grail.name: ingest_logs_to_grail
ingest_logs_to_grail.description: Sends each generated Palo Alto log line to the Dynatrace Log Ingest API v2 so that the logs are stored in Grail and can be queried with DQL in the Logs app or Notebooks.

analyze_blocked_traffic.name: analyze_blocked_traffic
analyze_blocked_traffic.description: Parses the generated log lines and produces a breakdown of blocked traffic by source, destination, application, and deny rule to help validate that the expected traffic is being blocked.
